# [clang-fuzzer] Crash in clang::APValue::MakeArray

**Author:** zczc66
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/173728
**Status:** Open
**Labels:** clang:codegen, confirmed, crash, generated by fuzzer

## Body

Hi, while testing clang by AFL++, it found a crashing case:
version : llvmorg-21.1.8

Flags:
```
export LLVM_CC_NAME=/home/user/hlpfuzz_aflpp/afl-clang-fast LLVM_CXX_NAME=/home/user/hlpfuzz_aflpp/afl-clang-fast++ CC=gclang CXX=gclang++
cmake -DLLVM_ENABLE_PROJECTS=clang -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DLLVM_USE_SANITIZE_COVERAGE=On -DLLVM_BUILD_RUNTIME=Off -G "Unix Makefiles" ../llvm
make clang-fuzzer
```

PoC:
```
int main ( ) { int i , sum = 0 ; for ( i = 1 ; 0x61 ; i ++ ) { sum += 1 / ( 1 + 0x35 ) ; } ( i * 4 ) + 1 ; return 1 + ( ( { struct tree_el { int val ; struct tree_el * * right , * left ; } state_t [ 1 + - ( sizeof ( 0x1c ) ) ] [ ! ( ! ( ( 1 / ( ( ( 0.0 ) ) - ( 0xaa ) ) ) + 1 ) % 2 ) % 2 == sizeof ( sizeof ( i = i <= i ) ) ] ; 0x97 < 10000 ; } ) ) ; }
```

Reproduction(Since make with ASan causes errors, I use gdb.):
```
gdb -q --batch \
    -x gdb_bt.cmd \
    --args /home/user/repo/llvm-project/gllvm_build/bin/clang-fuzzer poc
```

gdb_bt.cmd:
```
set pagination off 
set confirm off
set print thread-events off
handle SIGSTOP nostop noprint pass
handle SIGUSR1 nostop noprint pass
run
bt
quit
```

Crashing thread backtrace:

## Comments

### Comment 1 - shafik

Please see my comment in your previous report and update this one accordingly, thank you.

---

### Comment 2 - k-arrows

Reduced and modified from the original:
https://godbolt.org/z/fYjc5j7sb
```cpp
int main() {
  int i;
  return ({
    struct T {
    } s[-sizeof(0)][0 == sizeof(i < 0)];
    0;
  });
}
```

Backtrace:
```console
clang++: /root/llvm-project/llvm/tools/clang/lib/AST/ExprConstant.cpp:1856: void {anonymous}::SubobjectDesignator::adjustIndex({anonymous}::EvalInfo&, const clang::Expr*, llvm::APSInt, const {anonymous}::LValue&): Assertion `N.ugt(ArraySize) && "bounds check failed for in-bounds index"' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace, preprocessed source, and associated run script.
```

### Comment 3 - llvmbot


@llvm/issue-subscribers-clang-codegen

Author: None (zczc66)

<details>
Hi, while testing clang by AFL++, it found a crashing case:
version : llvmorg-21.1.8

Flags:
```
export LLVM_CC_NAME=/home/user/hlpfuzz_aflpp/afl-clang-fast LLVM_CXX_NAME=/home/user/hlpfuzz_aflpp/afl-clang-fast++ CC=gclang CXX=gclang++
cmake -DLLVM_ENABLE_PROJECTS=clang -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DLLVM_USE_SANITIZE_COVERAGE=On -DLLVM_BUILD_RUNTIME=Off -G "Unix Makefiles" ../llvm
make clang-fuzzer
```

PoC:
```
int main ( ) { int i , sum = 0 ; for ( i = 1 ; 0x61 ; i ++ ) { sum += 1 / ( 1 + 0x35 ) ; } ( i * 4 ) + 1 ; return 1 + ( ( { struct tree_el { int val ; struct tree_el * * right , * left ; } state_t [ 1 + - ( sizeof ( 0x1c ) ) ] [ ! ( ! ( ( 1 / ( ( ( 0.0 ) ) - ( 0xaa ) ) ) + 1 ) % 2 ) % 2 == sizeof ( sizeof ( i = i &lt;= i ) ) ] ; 0x97 &lt; 10000 ; } ) ) ; }
```

Reproduction(Since make with ASan causes errors, I use gdb.):
```
gdb -q --batch \
    -x gdb_bt.cmd \
    --args /home/user/repo/llvm-project/gllvm_build/bin/clang-fuzzer poc
```

gdb_bt.cmd:
```
set pagination off 
set confirm off
set print thread-events off
handle SIGSTOP nostop noprint pass
handle SIGUSR1 nostop noprint pass
run
bt
quit
```
